texto: I actually feel I'm in a much better place than I've ever been because I'm thankful people still love the songs that I've written, and they seem to like me. And they come to the shows in droves, and they get all excited, and I can still hit all the notes, and I don't look terrible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Don McLean: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I actually feel I'm in a much better place than I've ever been because I'm thankful people still …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, love, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e people.

frase_original: I actually feel I'm in a much better place than I've ever been because I'm thankful people still love the songs that I've written, and they seem to like me. And they come to the shows in droves, and they get all excited, and I can still hit all the notes, and I don't look terrible.
